data.body: RED oracle confirmed before production edits. Contract card: authoritative sources are this story AC, the normalized AnalyzerResult payloads from scc/lizard/jscpd, and registry Unavailable semantics. Tier: unit registry evaluation with canonical adapter fakes for exact payload/call-count/cache-lifecycle behavior, plus metrics_cli interface tests for real rendering. All five required tests are RED for the intended missing behavior: absent complexity/duplication specs, repeated scc invocation, and producer reasons collapsed to generic no-data. Happy path is test_structural_metrics_share_one_result_per_producer; unavailable, cache isolation, and CLI rendering remain held out.
